message:
test(B10): wave 73 — derive-trait coverage for snapshot_restore, scenario_runner, instrumented_future, calm

12 new tests covering Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Eq/Hash/Default traits:
- RestoreError, SnapshotStats, ValidationResult
- TraceCertificateSnapshot, ExplorationRunSummary, ScenarioExplorationResult
- AwaitPoint, InjectionMode, InjectionOutcome, InstrumentedPollResult
- Monotonicity, CalmClassification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
